---
id: reboot
title: "Reboot"
description: "Reboot command is used to perform warm reset of device. After successful reboot, device will reinitiate the connection to previously connected server. Upon failure notification will be sent."
sidebar_label: "Reboot"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gen-2-x-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Reboot"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/reboot"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Reboot command is used to perform warm reset of device. After successful reboot, device will reinitiate the connection to previously connected server. Upon failure notification will be sent.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"reboot","description":"Command issued to reboot the reader "},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"123abcd","description":"A unique identifier for the request, allowing tracking and debugging of the operation."}},"required":["command","requestId"]}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"reboot response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"reboot"},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"123abcd"},"apiVersion":{"type":"string","enum":["V1.0","V1.1"],"example":"V1.1"},"response":{"title":"response","x-stoplight":{"id":"1uzw0wye4si2y"},"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer","example":0,"description":"Response codes:\n\n| Code | Meaning |\n| --- | --- |\n| 0 | Success |\n| 1 | Command payload is accepted |\n| 2 | Invalid payload |\n| 3 | Not able to retrieve information |\n| 4 | Firmware update in progress |\n| 5 | Can't reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}},"required":["command","requestId","apiVersion","response"]},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"command":"reboot","requestId":"18996","apiVersion":"V1.1","response":{"code":1,"description":"Command payload is accepted"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
